title: OpenCode Router Config
description: Router policy for opencode-router. Most users only need billing_mode, provider_preferences, and role_model_preferences. Other properties default inside the plugin runtime and should only be written when intentionally overriding plugin behavior.

billing_mode.description: Billing strategy used by model-match when no explicit rematch mode is forced.

role_model_preferences.description: Optional per-role selector chains. First selector is primary, remaining selectors are ordered fallbacks.

apply_agent_model_overrides.description: Plugin-managed default. Usually omit unless intentionally disabling model override injection.

manage_agents.description: Plugin-managed default. Usually omit unless intentionally disabling managed router agents.

hide_backstage_agents.description: Plugin-managed default. Usually omit unless intentionally exposing backstage agents.

force_cross_model_family_for_copi.description: Advanced override for co-pi family separation.

model_match_policy_markdown_path.description: Optional path to a user-maintained markdown policy file that overrides role scoring weights and soft family/benchmark preferences.

opencode_models_timeout_ms.description: Optional timeout override for verified `opencode models` discovery.

global_avoid_keywords.description: Temporary hard-exclude list. Any model whose name or relay provider ID contains one of these substrings is filtered from all role matches. Use for maintenance windows (e.g. "museidea", "gemini"). Clear when the provider is back.
